title: Device Home Screen - Device image updates after changing earcups
scenario: Device headset image updates immediately when swappable earcups are changed on supported devices
steps: Pair a device that supports different earcups and go to Device Home Screen - headset image should show currently attached earcups.
Remove earcups - image remains the same.
Attach different earcups - the headset image in the app updates immediately after the earcups are changed.
expected: The headset image in the app updates immediately after the earcups are changed.
